sys_atf_step.description: Answer the questions on the form as follows: When do you need this device? = 2026-04-27 17:00:00 and When will you return it? = 2026-03-31 17:00:00 and Which device do you need? = P1000479 - Apple MacBook Pro 15"

test.display_value: End Date can't be before Start Date copy
